reviews.comment:
Desde hace 50 años cargo nafta en el ACA Central, siempre fuí bien atendido.
Nunca tuve motivo para alguna queja.

El lavadero que es un servicio TERCERIZADO, NO LO RECOMIENDO, me despintaron el paragalpe con la presion del agua,  de mi auto recién comprado 0 km, reclamé al ACA, me contestaron que era un servicio tercerizado, nadie se hizo responsable del daño.
No volví nunca más al lavadero.

(Translated by Google)
I've been filling up my car at the ACA Central for 50 years, and I've always received excellent service.

I've never had any reason to complain.

However, I DO NOT RECOMMEND the car wash, which is a THIRD-PARTY service. They damaged the paint on my bumper with the water pressure. It was brand new, I complained to the ACA, and they told me it was a third-party service, and no one took responsibility for the damage.
I never went back to that car wash.

reviewReply.comment: Gracias miguel comentaremos lo sucedido en el lavadero muy amable
